name: Fan → Cycle Speed
description: Increments through speed levels of the fan with the given ID when executed. If the fan's speed level is set to maximum when executed, fan will cycle off unless `off_speed_cycle` is set to `false`.

config_entries.label: Off Speed Cycle
config_entries.description: Determines if the fan will cycle off after cycling though its highest speed. Can be `true` or `false`. If `false` fan will cycle to its lowest speed instead of turning off. Defaults to `true`.
